= [[Altar]] =
Icons for the [[Altar]]

= Dragon Wishes =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Basic Dragon Crystal}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Dragonian - Growth}}||{{Retext|Use to get all kinds of Fungi|blue}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Dragonian - Multiply}}||{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +20k}} and {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +1k}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Dragonian - Time}}||{{Retext|Use to get random speedups|blue}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Fairy Dragon Power}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Healthcare Set}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Key Client Pack|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Red Dragon Egg|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Spittle of Dragon (Blue)|blue}}||Snail RUSH +20
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Spittle of Dragon (Green)|green}}||Snail DEF +20
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Spittle of Dragon (Red)|red}}||Snail HP +200
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Spittle of Dragon (Yellow)|yellow}}||Snail ATK +20
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Unknown Magic Potion}}
|}

= Souls =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|1h Soul Red}}||Red/Chaos
{{IconExampleRowWithText|2h Soul Red}}||Red/Chaos
{{IconExampleRowWithText|4h Soul Red}}||Red/Chaos
{{IconExampleRowWithText|8h Soul Red}}||Red/Chaos
{{IconExampleSpacer}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|1h Soul Yellow}}||Yellow/Order
{{IconExampleRowWithText|2h Soul Yellow}}||Yellow/Order
{{IconExampleRowWithText|4h Soul Yellow}}||Yellow/Order
{{IconExampleRowWithText|8h Soul Yellow}}||Yellow/Order
{{IconExampleSpacer}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|1h Soul Green}}||Green/Neutral
{{IconExampleRowWithText|2h Soul Green}}||Green/Neutral
{{IconExampleRowWithText|4h Soul Green}}||Green/Neutral
{{IconExampleRowWithText|8h Soul Green}}||Green/Neutral
|}

= [[Altar#Unique_Offerings|Unique Offerings]] =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Gaia's Tainted R Hand}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Gaia's Tainted Stomach}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Gaia's Tainted Hair}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Tainted L Hand of Gaia}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Tainted Lungs of Gaia}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Tainted Tooth of Gaia}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Tainted Liver of Gaia}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Broken Dragon's Horn}}
|}

[[Category:Altar]]
[[Category:Icons]]
